description: Since 1985, Manimaran palgova has been a cherished name for authentic Indian sweets. Our journey began with a passion to preserve age-old recipes, using only the purest ingredients. Every sweet we craft is a testament to our commitment to quality and tradition.We believe true sweetness lies in purity. That’s why every product is prepared with carefully sourced ingredients, maintaining the highest standards of quality and hygiene. From classic delicacies to signature creations, our sweets are designed to offer a luxurious experience rooted in tradition.
title: Our Heritage of Taste
